commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent harness selection so CLI runtime aliases such as claude-cli and google-gemini-cli route in-process compaction through the PI harness, with regression tests for selector and compaction entrypoint behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows that a model-scoped claude-cli runtime reaches selectAgentHarness during maybeCompactAgentHarnessSession and current main throws MissingAgentHarnessError before PI compaction can proceed; I did not run the repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof, not a narrow code repair that ClawSweeper can safely generate.
